footer.tagline: Interactive learning paths across many fields.

explorePage.categoriesDescription: Architecture, IT, finance, healthcare, creative, business, and more.
explorePage.trendingDescription: Roadmaps learners are following right now.
explorePage.subcategoriesDescription: Choose a topic to see available roadmaps.
explorePage.roadmapsDescription: Select a roadmap to start learning.

roadmaps.softwareEngineerCareerDesc: Programming fundamentals, tools, and your first portfolio.
roadmaps.financialAnalystCareerDesc: Understand finance industry roles, skills, and certification pathways.
roadmaps.architectCareerDesc: Explore architecture from technical drawing to design portfolio.
roadmaps.nursingCareerDesc: A guided path into nursing — from health sciences to clinical practice.
roadmaps.marketingStrategistDesc: Learn how marketing careers work from research to digital strategy.
roadmaps.graphicDesignerPathDesc: Build creative fundamentals and a portfolio for design careers.

roadmapPage.learningPathDescription: Follow the branching path — click any node to open learning materials.
roadmapPage.treeHint: Solid = core path · Dashed = optional · Amber = specialization

careerStart.title: Start Here
careerStart.material: Understand what this roadmap covers, how long it may take, and what outcomes to expect before committing to a major or career switch.

industryAwareness.title: Field Overview
industryAwareness.description: Get a clear picture of what this field covers.
industryAwareness.material: Read introductory guides and sample lessons to see what you will learn in this roadmap.

programmingBasics.title: Programming Foundations
programmingBasics.description: Core building blocks for software careers.
programmingBasics.material: Get familiar with how code works, development environments, and problem-solving patterns.

htmlBasics.title: HTML
htmlBasics.material: Learn semantic HTML, forms, and accessibility basics.

cssLayout.title: CSS
cssLayout.description: Styling and layout for the web.
cssLayout.material: Practice flexbox, grid, and responsive design.

javascriptIntro.title: JavaScript
javascriptIntro.description: Interactivity and logic on the web.
javascriptIntro.material: Variables, functions, DOM APIs, and async basics.

reactBasics.title: React
reactBasics.material: Build interfaces with components, props, and hooks.

nodeBasics.title: Node.js (Optional)
nodeBasics.material: Explore APIs, modules, and backend fundamentals.

gitWorkflow.title: Git (Optional)
gitWorkflow.material: Commits, branches, pull requests, and collaboration.

portfolioProject.title: Portfolio Project
portfolioProject.material: Ship a small full-stack or frontend project for your portfolio.

financeIndustryOverview.title: Finance Industry Overview
financeIndustryOverview.description: Roles across banking, FP&A, and advisory.
financeIndustryOverview.material: Map career tracks, certifications, and typical entry points.

accountingBasics.title: Accounting Basics
accountingBasics.material: Balance sheet, income statement, cash flow, and journal entries.

excelModeling.title: Excel & Modeling
excelModeling.material: Formulas, pivot tables, and three-statement models.

valuationIntro.title: Valuation Intro
valuationIntro.material: DCF, comparables, and basic M&A concepts.

cfaPrep.title: CFA Prep (Optional)
cfaPrep.material: Overview of CFA levels and study plan.

architectureIndustryOverview.title: Architecture Industry Overview
architectureIndustryOverview.material: Understand architect vs drafter vs urban planner roles.

architecturalHistory.title: Architectural History
architecturalHistory.material: Survey key periods and influential architects.

cadSoftware.title: CAD Software
cadSoftware.material: Hands-on with AutoCAD or similar tools.

designPortfolio.title: Design Portfolio
designPortfolio.material: Curate boards, models, and case studies.

healthcareIndustryOverview.title: Healthcare Industry Overview
healthcareIndustryOverview.material: Explore nursing vs doctor vs allied health paths.

healthSciences.title: Health Sciences
healthSciences.material: Biology, chemistry, and patient safety basics.

clinicalPractice.title: Clinical Practice
clinicalPractice.material: Vitals, hygiene protocols, and bedside skills.

licensingExam.title: Licensing Exam
licensingExam.material: Exam format, prep resources, and timelines.

businessIndustryOverview.title: Business Industry Overview
businessIndustryOverview.material: Map business functions and career ladders.

brandStrategy.title: Brand Strategy
brandStrategy.material: Brand pillars, tone of voice, and campaigns.

digitalMarketing.title: Digital Marketing
digitalMarketing.material: SEO, social ads, email, and content funnels.

creativeIndustryOverview.title: Creative Industry Overview
creativeIndustryOverview.material: Freelance vs agency vs in-house paths.

creativePortfolio.title: Creative Portfolio
creativePortfolio.material: Case studies with process and outcomes.
